name: beplus-advanced-reviews
description: Modern WooCommerce product reviews with image support, star distribution, AJAX filtering, and load more.

scripts.composer:install: php composer.phar install --no-dev 2>/dev/null || composer install --no-dev 2>/dev/null || echo 'Composer not available'
scripts.precommit: npm run build:css && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:php:all
scripts.prepush: npm run ensure:composer && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:php:all && npm run build
